arts.ttl: Soaring Nico Raskin has Rangers dressing room bursting with pride as 'stop Daizen Maeda' tweak works a treat
arts.sum: A key man is adamant that it will be a pointless victory if they don't take care of Hibs at Easter Road

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor shares what Celtic plan to 'tweak' in future matches against Rangers
arts.sum: Speaking to Mailsport, McGregor admitted Celtic will look to ‘tweak’ their work on the ball when trying to break down Rangers’ low block that they have deployed in recent derby encounters. Celtic are seeking to put the disappointment of their defeat against Rangers behind them when they take on St Mirren tomorrow.

arts.ttl: I made my Celtic debut at Wembley on the day I signed - then quit six months later to seal a dream exit
arts.sum: One of the first signing of Tony Mowbray's reign in charge, the defender's time in Glasgow proved to be short-lived

arts.ttl: Shaun Rooney joins new club months after St Mirren exit in wake of assault charge
arts.sum: The former St Johnstone and Inverness Caley Thistle defender parted ways with the Buddies in October last year

arts.ttl: Mark Wilson identifies the position Celtic should look to strengthen in January
arts.sum: Mark Wilson urges Celtic to sign a sitting midfielder Speaking on Open Goal, Wilson made it clear that he would like to see Celtic sign a sitting midfielder to provide cover for club captain Callum McGregor .

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted XI to face St Mirren as Brendan Rodgers has food for thought after Ibrox defeat
arts.sum: Celtic will look to banish any lingering memories from their defeat against Rangers tomorrow when they take on St Mirren in the Scottish Premiership. Your predicted XI in full is as follows: Schmeichel, Johnston, Carter-Vickers, Trusty, Valle, McGregor, Engels, McCowan, Kuhn, Maeda, Kyogo .

arts.ttl: High wire Hatate is no £25m Celtic man and his total liability flaw makes him risky business – Parkhead analysis
arts.sum: He can be so risky in possession and he must take years off managers

arts.ttl: Greg Taylor makes stance clear on Dinamo Zagreb interest as Celtic future hangs in balance
arts.sum: The Scotland international is free to talk to non-Scottish clubs about a pre-contract agreement and Dinamo Zagreb are keen admirers of the Celtic defender . Celtic’s Greg Taylor has attracted a lot of speculation in recent weeks as his unresolved contract situation continues to create uncertainty over his future at Parkhead.

arts.ttl: Mark O'Hara makes Celtic admission as St Mirren travel to face Bhoys in Scottish Premiership
arts.sum: Speaking to The Daily Record, St Mirren captain Mark O’Hara has admitted his side will need to be at their best to stand a chance this weekend against Celtic but believes the match could suit the Buddies due to their underdog status. “We know we need to do our best to get anything, and it might be a game that suits us going there.

arts.ttl: Watch best of action as Rangers beat Celtic in derby
arts.sum: Watch the best of the action as Rangers beat Celtic 3-0 in the second Scottish Premiership Old Firm derby of the season.
